name: Pixel gun apocalypse 9
description: Fight, survive, and have fun in a pixel blocky shooter packed with action. Play multiplayer battles with friends or enjoy offline zombie missions anytime. Choose from many powerful guns, face crazy zombie waves, and control funny blocky characters in fast matches. Web Dev https://www.freecrazygames.io/ Simple controls, colorful maps, and nonstop shooting make every round exciting, chaotic, and easy to enjoy.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
